comment.body:
Cleveland Fed president and an other member whispering Feds gonna cut in June. Market is supported for now from institutionals that I posted, and from short squeezes.
 Next week is risky.  Datas coming. Still geo risk, still no investor confidence, bull side is crowded for now.
So risk stays there. Bottom is most probably in but not yet confirmed.
Some steps towards US inner progression is made, but the world order is shifting, and completely changing if no truce. Friend-shoring.
